FITLIFY
AI Fitness Planner
Tauri Version 2.3.0

🚀 Powered by Tauri

Modern desktop application framework with Rust backend for enhanced performance and security.

What's New in v2.3.0

🤖

AI-Powered Plans

Personalized workout plans generated by advanced AI

📊

Progress Tracking

Monitor your fitness journey with detailed analytics

🛡️

Enhanced Security

Sandboxed environment with Rust backend for maximum security

⚡

Better Performance

50-70% smaller bundle size with faster startup times
